Name.description: Deployment name as specified by the vendor.

ModelName.description: Optional vendor model name. Defaults to Name when omitted.

ClientName.description: Client name (e.g., OpenAI, Azure, AzureAIInference, Ollama, AzureSpeech).

ConnectionName.description: Connection name used to configure the provider.

Endpoint.description: Contained-connection endpoint alias for recipe imports. Supported by AzureSpeech deployments.

AuthenticationType.description: Contained-connection authentication type alias for recipe imports. Supported by AzureSpeech deployments.

ApiKey.description: Contained-connection API key alias for recipe imports. Supported by AzureSpeech deployments.

IdentityId.description: Contained-connection managed identity client ID alias for recipe imports. Supported by AzureSpeech deployments.

Endpoint.description: Contained-connection endpoint. Used by AzureSpeech deployments.

AuthenticationType.description: Azure authentication type. Supported values are Default, ManagedIdentity, or ApiKey.

ApiKey.description: Contained-connection API key. Required when AuthenticationType is ApiKey.

IdentityId.description: Optional client ID of a user-assigned managed identity. Used when AuthenticationType is ManagedIdentity.

Properties.description: Provider-specific deployment properties. AzureSpeech deployments use Endpoint, AuthenticationType, ApiKey, and optional IdentityId.

anyOf.description: The deployment purpose, or a comma-separated flag value such as 'Chat, Utility'. Defaults to Chat when not specified.

Deployments.description: The AI deployments to create or update.
